videos.headline: Wyoming goes 62 yards for TD on 1st drive of the game
videos.description: Wyoming scores on the first drive of the game with a Harrison Wayle 62-yard rushing touchdown.

videos.headline: Jonathon Brooks' massive gain leads to a Quinn Ewers TD
